steps.title: Identify the key claim
steps.content: The student claims audiences ultimately preferred “resolution and closure” over the ongoing tension and suspense of the serial.

steps.title: Find supporting evidence
steps.content:
Higher viewership of the finale demonstrates audiences were most invested in the resolution.
  • A measures production cost
  • C reflects modern criticism
  • D addresses genre classification—none of which reveal what audiences actually preferred
. That matches choice B — B is correct.
